title: microchilus dasilvae
intro: Microchilus dasilvae, also known as the 'Tiger's Claw Orchid', is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of the Philippines. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The extracts of Microchilus dasilvae are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including immune system support and wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often dried and ground into a powder, which can be used in teas, tinctures, or topical applications.
